{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/ENTITIES.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Именованные сущности

_Файлов просмотрено:_ 1689


h2. Люди и авторы (7)

|| Имя || Упоминаний || Файлов ||
|| **Lorenzo** || 3900 || 274 ||
|| **svend4** || 2471 || 369 ||
|| **kksudo** || 446 || 126 ||
|| **spbmolot** || 431 || 127 ||
|| **Андрей** || 210 || 63 ||
|| **Виталий** || 92 || 43 ||
|| **Антропик** || 59 || 33 ||

h2. Проекты (22)

|| Проект || Упоминаний || Файлов ||
|| **Nautilus** || 10824 || 806 ||
|| **Svyazi** || 7572 || 470 ||
|| **Cowork** || 4631 || 333 ||
|| **ingit** || 4420 || 310 ||
|| **Lorenzo** || 3900 || 274 ||
|| **SGB** || 2168 || 331 ||
|| **Yodoca** || 1349 || 223 ||
|| **CardIndex** || 1346 || 204 ||
|| **AgentFS** || 1333 || 176 ||
|| **NGT** || 1295 || 254 ||
|| **knowledge-space** || 1032 || 159 ||
|| **MemNet** || 771 || 174 ||
|| **Rufler** || 736 || 142 ||
|| **mclaude** || 722 || 136 ||
|| **LiteParse** || 605 || 129 ||
|| **SENTINEL** || 574 || 128 ||
|| **AI Factory** || 536 || 118 ||
|| **Wikontic** || 392 || 79 ||
|| **Firecrawl** || 224 || 34 ||
|| **agent-memory-mcp** || 166 || 57 ||
|| **MCP Tool Search** || 29 || 12 ||
|| **Shield** || 27 || 14 ||

h2. Организации (9)

|| Организация || Упоминаний || Файлов ||
|| **Anthropic** || 24809 || 1299 ||
|| **Claude** || 4908 || 893 ||
|| **Habr** || 4283 || 396 ||
|| **GitHub** || 3159 || 418 ||
|| **Obsidian** || 2890 || 639 ||
|| **Хабр** || 912 || 188 ||
|| **Google** || 141 || 58 ||
|| **OpenAI** || 137 || 74 ||
|| **ChatGPT** || 121 || 72 ||

h2. Технологии и стандарты (24)

|| Технология || Упоминаний || Файлов ||
|| **MCP** || 3904 || 493 ||
|| **RAG** || 3867 || 544 ||
|| **MIT** || 2937 || 537 ||
|| **LLM** || 1854 || 347 ||
|| **JSON** || 997 || 206 ||
|| **Python** || 708 || 209 ||
|| **REST** || 630 || 223 ||
|| **YAML** || 399 || 155 ||
|| **CRDT** || 385 || 84 ||
|| **Rust** || 248 || 124 ||
|| **BSL** || 216 || 85 ||
|| **Apache** || 202 || 93 ||
|| **SQLite** || 137 || 50 ||
|| **Mermaid** || 119 || 44 ||
|| **PostgreSQL** || 66 || 37 ||
|| **LangChain** || 53 || 33 ||
|| **TF-IDF** || 52 || 27 ||
|| **TypeScript** || 49 || 28 ||
|| **FAISS** || 40 || 22 ||
|| **WebSocket** || 30 || 19 ||
|| **FastAPI** || 21 || 11 ||
|| **JWT** || 15 || 10 ||
|| **GraphQL** || 12 || 9 ||
|| **OAuth** || 9 || 6 ||

h2. GitHub репозитории (15)

|| Репозиторий || Упоминаний ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/nautilus](https://github.com/svend4/nautilus) || 67 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/ingit](https://github.com/svend4/ingit) || 26 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/pro2](https://github.com/svend4/pro2) || 18 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/info1](https://github.com/svend4/info1) || 16 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/meta](https://github.com/svend4/meta) || 12 ||
|| [https://github.com/AnastasiyaW/knowledge-space](https://github.com/AnastasiyaW/knowledge-space) || 12 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/data70](https://github.com/svend4/data70) || 9 ||
|| [https://github.com/settings/tokens](https://github.com/settings/tokens) || 9 ||
|| [https://github.com/camel-ai/camel](https://github.com/camel-ai/camel) || 9 ||
|| [https://github.com/anthropics/mcp](https://github.com/anthropics/mcp) || 8 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/info40](https://github.com/svend4/info40) || 6 ||
|| [https://github.com/svend4/info7](https://github.com/svend4/info7) || 6 ||
|| [https://github.com/kksudo/agentfs](https://github.com/kksudo/agentfs) || 5 ||
|| [https://github.com/spbmolot/ngt-memory](https://github.com/spbmolot/ngt-memory) || 4 ||
|| [https://github.com/VitalyOborin/yodoca](https://github.com/VitalyOborin/yodoca) || 4 ||

h2. Ко-встречаемость проектов (топ пары)

|| Пара || Общих файлов ||
|| Cowork ↔ ingit || 272 ||
|| Nautilus ↔ Cowork || 240 ||
|| Nautilus ↔ SGB || 219 ||
|| Nautilus ↔ ingit || 216 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ NGT || 200 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ Yodoca || 199 ||
|| Yodoca ↔ NGT || 184 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ CardIndex || 174 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ AgentFS || 163 ||
|| Nautilus ↔ Svyazi || 150 ||
|| AgentFS ↔ NGT || 149 ||
|| Yodoca ↔ AgentFS || 143 ||
|| Cowork ↔ SGB || 142 ||
|| CardIndex ↔ NGT || 142 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ knowledge-space || 138 ||
|| ingit ↔ SGB || 136 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ Rufler || 135 ||
|| Svyazi ↔ Lorenzo || 133 ||
|| Yodoca ↔ CardIndex || 131 ||
|| CardIndex ↔ AgentFS || 131 ||
